title: An Act to Add Positions to the Maine State Police Executive Protection Unit
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 5, 2026
last_house_action: 12/15/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on December 15, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 3/5/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
